aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Tri State Air, Inc. due to significant gaps in structured data, conversational content, and authority signals.

Q&A section is inactive or not utilized.

agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
